name: ETRS89-ALB [CORS]
scope: Geodesy. Active GNSS network / Continuously Operating Reference Station (CORS) network.
remarks: Used for the coordinates of the 27 reference stations of the active ALBCOR network in Albania. Differences with the official KRGJSH realization (CRS code 11046) used for other spatial referencing are negligible (5-7 mm for all components).
